/usr/bin/c++ -faligned-new -O2 -Wall -fPIC -ffast-math -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -miphoneos-version-min=14.0 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../../../lib/libtvm_ffi_testing.dylib -install_name @rpath/libtvm_ffi_testing.dylib CMakeFiles/tvm_ffi_testing.dir/src/ffi/testing/testing.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/app/Desktop/AIVoiceAssistant/AIVoiceAssistant/build/lib ../../../lib/libtvm_ffi.dylib
